race.comment: Tricky 1000m race. If LANDMARK (10) can settle closer from a good draw he'll go close. He got home strongly first up at Caulfield Heath under 61kg to grab second, dropping 4kg into this on the bigger track. He's got good ability on his day and will take holding out. ACTUALITY (15) is racing consistently without breaking through. She's placed in her past two and should get every chance tracking the speed. WINNASEDGE (2) resumes. He put up some nice performances last time in against subsequent Group performed horses, albeit over a touch further. 1000m here from the wide gate and where he gets to is the niggle. PER SEMPRE (12) charged home fresh in a strong effort, solid again last time. She'll be running on late. HARRY GOT STYLES (3) resumes at his pet trip and draws for a lovely run.
